label: TomTom
description: Access TomTom Maps, geocoding, real-time traffic data, and routing APIs using an API key from your TomTom developer account.

form.title: Connect TomTom
form.subtitle: Paste your TomTom API key to enable maps, geocoding, traffic, and routing.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste an API key from your TomTom Developer Portal. No OAuth setup required — copy the key and you're ready to query maps, geocoding, traffic, and routing endpoints.
methods.how_to:
## Get your TomTom API Key

### Steps

1. Log in to the [TomTom Developer Portal](https://developer.tomtom.com/) (create a free account if you don't have one).
2. Click your avatar or account name in the top-right corner and select **My Dashboard**.
3. Navigate to **Keys & Usage** in the left-hand sidebar.
4. Click **+ Add a new app** (or select an existing one).
5. Give the app a name (e.g. `Anton`) and check the APIs you want to enable (Maps, Geocoding, Traffic, Routing, etc.).
6. Click **Create API Key**. Your new key appears in the list.
7. Copy the key and paste it into the **API Key** field below.

### Notes

- Each API key can have per-product permissions scoped at creation time. Enable all products you intend to use.
- Free-tier keys have request limits; upgrade your plan in the portal if you hit quota errors.
- To revoke access, return to **Keys & Usage**, find the key, and click **Delete**.
- Keys are shown in full at any time from your dashboard — no one-time reveal.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in the TomTom Developer Portal under My Dashboard → Keys & Usage.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: Override only if you use a regional or private TomTom endpoint. Leave blank to use the default global API.

fields.name: default_product
fields.label: Primary API Product
fields.description: Which TomTom product Anton should default to when making requests.
